name: CS 162: Operating Systems and Systems Programming - Berkeley
desc: Full lecture series from UC Berkeley CS 162 covering operating systems, systems programming, threads, processes, synchronization, scheduling, virtual memory, storage, filesystems, networking, distributed systems, and key-value storage.
